name: Unclaimed Payroll Checks
description: Notice of Names of Persons Appearing to be Owners of Checks Issued by the City of Framingham, Which Have Not Been Cashed and are Deemed Abandoned. If your name appears on this list you can submit a claim by contacting the City of Framingham Treasurer/Collector’s office.

description: Dogs licensed by the City Clerk's office as of January 1st, 2020

name: Checkbook
description: Details of expenses (Accounts Payable) from fiscal year 2014 through 2019 including vendor, check, and amounts. See dataset Checkbook - Fiscal YTD for expenses in the current fiscal year.

description: Overlay map of the Framingham Zoning Districts

description: Total payroll earnings for each employee for calendar year 2019.

description: Mapping overlay of parcel boundaries

name: Payroll Earnings

columns.name: 10 MO SECR VAC PAY RET YES

description: Annual employee position earnings from 2013 through 2019. Column TOTAL EARNINGS contains the annual total earnings. The other columns contain the detail earnings by payment type.

columns.name: Last Known Address

description: Notice of Names of Persons Appearing to be Owners of Checks Issued by the City of Framingham, Which Have Not Been Cashed and are Deemed Abandoned. If your name appears on this list you can submit a claim by contacting the City of Framingham Treasurer/Collector’s office.

columns.name: NOTIFIED
columns.description: Date and time station was notified to respond

columns.name: UNIT_ID

Apparatus ID:
E - Engine
P - Platform
A - Ambulance
C - Car
R - Rescue
L - Ladder

columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: National Fire Incident Response code for this type of incident

columns.name: CROSS_STREET
columns.description: The closest intersection. Used when street address information is not available.

columns.name: ARRIVAL
columns.description: Time first unit arrived on scene

columns.name: STATION_ID
columns.description:
1 - Fire Dispatch Rte 9
2 - Watson Pl
3 - Loring Drive
5 - Concord St
7 - Water St
9 - Mutual Aid

description: Incident reports with unit response information completed since January 1, 2015 to June 30, 2020.

description: Sum of earnings for calendar year 2019 for each job class by employee.

description: Response time analysis for units responding to Fire and Medical incidents in Station 2 (Saxonville) response area. Analysis of call location for optimal station location.

name: Checkbook - Fiscal YTD
description: Details of expenses (Accounts Payable) from the beginning of the most recent Fiscal Year, 2020. Includes vendor, checks, and amounts to Jun 30, 2020. See also dataset Checkbook, which contains historical data starting in Fiscal Year 2014 (July 1, 2013) though Fiscal 2019.

name: General Licenses
description: Current Common Victualer (Restaurant), Alcohol, Motor Vehicle Reseller, Amusement, Coin Operated Devices, Pool Tables, Second Hand Goods, Hawker/Peddler licenses issued by the Inspectional Services department to Jun 30, 2020.

name: Public Works Permits
description: Street and Trench Permits issued from January 2015 to Jun 30, 2020
